See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 22822 => 'Lomé', 22823 => 'Región Marítima', 22824 => 'Región Plateaux', 22825 => 'Región Central', 22826 => 'Región de Kara', 22827 => 'Región de Savannah', ];
